disambiguated.context: Picking up my little brother from the Y last week, I saw a really fat guy and a thin one waiting outside. The thin guy had told me that he never does any kind of sports, he just comes to give his fat friend rides, since he's always playing sports and stuff.
disambiguated.question: Who is too lazy to play sports?
